text:
miwi        2009-03-22 15:27:36 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    devel                Makefile 
  Added files:
    devel/libdap         Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  libdap is A C++ SDK which contains an implementation of DAP 2.0 and 3.1,
  Client- and Server-side support classes and a prototype implementation
  of the AIS.
  
  WWW: http://opendap.org/download/libdap++.html
  
  PR:             ports/131972
  Submitted by:   Wen Heping <wenheping at gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.3427    +1 -0      ports/devel/Makefile
  1.1       +30 -0     ports/devel/libdap/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/devel/libdap/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/devel/libdap/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +105 -0    ports/devel/libdap/pkg-plist (new)
